LanguageData.ABY_CrownedCorePlate.label: crowned core plate
LanguageData.ABY_CrownedCorePlate.description: A dominion-grade torso shell grown around a crowned core fragment recovered from the hell slice. The plate is less a suit of armor than a wearable administrative seal: blackened plasteel ribs, uranium heat channels and crown-pressure nodes hold a hostile fragment in a human-sized frame. It is heavy, rare, and built for colonists who have already crossed the gate once.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownedCoreHelm.label: crowned core helm
LanguageData.ABY_CrownedCoreHelm.description: A sealed dominion helm built around a splintered crown logic lens. Its visor does not simply protect the wearer; it frames the battlefield as a set of authorized targets, breach vectors and condemned structures. The halo braces are intentionally restrained so the helm reads as wargear rather than ceremony.
